name: Make Some Noise
title: Single Target
desc_lv1: Deals Lightning DMG equal to 100% of Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy.
raw_html_lv1: Deals Lightning DMG equal to 100% of Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy.

name: Let the Storm Rage On
title: AoE
desc_lv1: Deals Lightning DMG equal to 60% of the Trailblazer's ATK to all enemies and gains 20 point(s) of "Certified Banger."
raw_html_lv1: Deals Lightning DMG equal to 60% of the Trailblazer's ATK to all enemies and gains 20 point(s) of "Certified Banger."

name: May the Trailblaze Fly You Starward
title: Support
desc_lv1:
Gains 5 Punchline point(s), increases the CRIT DMG of a designated ally by 50% for 3 turn(s), and dispels Crowd Control debuffs from them.
If the target possesses an Elation Skill, they additionally gain 10 point(s) of "Certified Banger" and immediately use their Elation Skill 1 time, taking a fixed amount of 20 Punchline point(s) into account. If the enemy target is defeated before the Elation Skill is unleashed, the Elation Skill is unleashed on enemy targets that just entered combat instead.
If the target does not possess an Elation Skill, their action advances by 50%.

name: We Are So Back!
title: Enhance
desc_lv1:
After using Technique, 1 of the following effects will be randomly granted:
Small chance to gain "Hearty Laughter": Increases Elation by 30%.
High chance to gain "Irrepressible Laughter": Increases Elation by 20%.
When the next battle begins, increases all allies' Elation stat by the corresponding amount for 3 turn(s).

High chance to gain "Irrepressible Laughter": Increases Elation by 20%.
When the next battle begins, increases all allies' Elation stat by the corresponding amount for 3 turn(s).

name: That Smile Hits Different
title: Support
desc_lv1:
After using an attack, regenerates 10 Energy and gains 3 Punchline point(s).
When the Trailblazer holds "Certified Banger," their Skill additionally deals 30% Lightning Elation DMG to all enemies. This DMG is calculated using the highest "Certified Banger" value among all allies.

When the Trailblazer holds "Certified Banger," their Skill additionally deals 30% Lightning Elation DMG to all enemies. This DMG is calculated using the highest "Certified Banger" value among all allies.

name: I Said "Elation," Did I Stutter?
title: AoE
desc_lv1: Deals 8 instances of DMG, with each instance dealing 20% Lightning Elation DMG to one random enemy. Then, deals 60% Lightning Elation DMG, which is split evenly among all enemies.
raw_html_lv1: Deals 8 instances of DMG, with each instance dealing 20% Lightning Elation DMG to one random enemy. Then, deals 60% Lightning Elation DMG, which is split evenly among all enemies.

name: On Cloud Nine
title: ASCEND CALCULATOR A
desc_lv1: For every 200 point(s) of Trailblazer's ATK that exceeds 1000 , increases this unit's Elation by 10.0% , up to a maximum increase of 60.0% .
raw_html_lv1: For every 200 point(s) of Trailblazer's ATK that exceeds 1000 , increases this unit's Elation by 10.0% , up to a maximum increase of 60.0% .

name: Screw It, We Ball
title: ASCEND CALCULATOR B
desc_lv1: Increases this unit's CRIT Rate by 15% . After using Ultimate, recovers 1 Skill Point(s) for the team.
raw_html_lv1: Increases this unit's CRIT Rate by 15% . After using Ultimate, recovers 1 Skill Point(s) for the team.

name: Aha, Sic 'Em!
title: ASCEND CALCULATOR C
desc_lv1: After an ally target uses an Elation Skill, Trailblazer additionally gains 2 point(s) of " Certified Banger " the next time they use their Skill.
raw_html_lv1: After an ally target uses an Elation Skill, Trailblazer additionally gains 2 point(s) of " Certified Banger " the next time they use their Skill.
